content: Severing Path is mainly used for combos since its startup isn't fast enough to use as an M1 trading tool,
and it's too punishable to be a mix-up.
Don't use it on a ragdolled player if they have their evasive since it can get punished.
Jump after landing this move if you want to follow up with Second Wind to make it safer.
severing-path.author: Air Putrifier

content: Resolute Slash is really good to punish wasted side dashes from a close-medium distance.
It's also good evasive bait. The regular variant is useless; only use Black Flash.
resolute-slash.author: Air Putrifier

content: This one is always better? OI! Cursed Partners bring me more Melee Iframes!!!
resolute-black-flash.author: Deptr

content: Outburst is a really safe move;
using it in M1 trades or when you know you're about to get hit basically guarantees your safety
since it will either hit the parry or the explosion. It can also be used to parry projectiles.
If you want to use the fully charged variant in a combo
but you know the opponent won't be ragdolled for enough time to land it,
you can use Rika Smash during the windup to extend their ragdoll
(pairing these 2 moves together is also really good evasive bait,
but you're putting your best moves on cooldown for it).
outburst.author: Air Putrifier

content: The first use of Second Wind is punishable in neutral,
but it's a very small window, so if they're not expecting it, you can get away with it.
If you don't land the first use, save the second one for combos.
second-wind.author: Air Putrifier

content: Ok! [b]Genuinely[/b], why the hell does this thing deal a total of 10 damages???
second-wind-barrage.author: Deptr

content: Rika Smash is a good tool for punishing opponents trying to get an advantage out of your own mistakes.
It forces the opponent to block, so it's useful in M1 trades.
You can also use it with Outburst, like I mentioned earlier.
rika-smash.author: Air Putrifier

content: Don't use Rika Launch.
rika-launch.author: Air Putrifier

content: Don't use Rika Launch.
aerial-rika-launch.author: Air Putrifier

content: Rika Haymaker is the best evasive baiting tool Rika has.
You can use it in neutral to guarantee your safety while it's active.
rika-haymaker.author: Air Putrifier
